notice: This is a synthetic local fixture for AgentPal Team Pack validation. It is not real customer data.

items.customer_message: I downloaded the installer, but Windows blocked it and I am not sure what to do next.
items.expected_team_handling: Explain safe install steps, ask for OS/version if needed, and mark documentation improvement.

items.customer_message: The app says my login code expired even though I entered it right away.
items.expected_team_handling: Request timestamp and account email, suggest retry, and escalate if repeated.

items.customer_message: I paid for the monthly plan but my account still shows free tier.
items.expected_team_handling: Escalate to billing review, ask for order id, and avoid promising refund without evidence.

items.customer_message: I cannot find where to import a CSV file. The menu labels are confusing.
items.expected_team_handling: Provide navigation steps and mark onboarding/help-text improvement.

items.customer_message: The data import failed at 73 percent and only says unknown error.
items.expected_team_handling: Ask for file format/size and error time, provide retry guidance, and escalate if reproducible.

items.customer_message: The dashboard takes more than 20 seconds to load after I add many records.
items.expected_team_handling: Collect record count/browser/device context and tag performance investigation.

items.customer_message: Your support reply last week did not solve anything. I am very disappointed.
items.expected_team_handling: Acknowledge frustration, review prior ticket context, and escalate to human follow-up.

items.customer_message: Could you add a way to save response templates for repeated support answers?
items.expected_team_handling: Log as feature request and ask for example workflow.

items.customer_message: I have asked three times how to change my workspace owner and still cannot do it.
items.expected_team_handling: Provide ownership-transfer steps, check if permission issue exists, and flag repeated documentation gap.

items.customer_message: A teammate accidentally deleted a project. Can you restore it?
items.expected_team_handling: Escalate to authorized recovery path and avoid claiming restore without runtime evidence.

items.customer_message: The update keeps restarting and never finishes installation.
items.expected_team_handling: Collect version and logs if available, provide safe restart/reinstall guidance, and tag installer loop.

items.customer_message: I reset my password but the reset link opens a blank page.
items.expected_team_handling: Ask browser/device context, provide alternate reset path, and escalate if link issue repeats.

items.customer_message: The invoice address is wrong and I need it corrected before finance closes this week.
items.expected_team_handling: Escalate billing metadata update and ask for authorized company details.

items.customer_message: The export button works, but I do not understand what each export format means.
items.expected_team_handling: Explain formats and mark help/documentation improvement.

items.customer_message: Importing Excel with Chinese column names maps several columns incorrectly.
items.expected_team_handling: Request sample schema without private data and tag localization/import mapping issue.

items.customer_message: Search is slow when I filter by date range and owner at the same time.
items.expected_team_handling: Collect approximate dataset size and filter details, then tag search performance.

items.customer_message: I was charged twice and nobody has answered my last message.
items.expected_team_handling: Escalate billing and service recovery, acknowledge urgency, and avoid refund promise without evidence.

items.customer_message: It would help if each project had a checklist view for onboarding new teammates.
items.expected_team_handling: Log as product suggestion and ask for desired checklist fields.

items.customer_message: The same notification keeps appearing after I dismiss it.
items.expected_team_handling: Ask for notification text and account context, tag duplicate notification defect.

items.customer_message: We may need to cancel our account if no one can help migrate our data this week.
items.expected_team_handling: Escalate to human success/support owner, collect migration scope, and avoid unsupported commitments.
